description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on pushes to tags, the master branch, and on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy across ubuntu-18.04, macos-10.15, and windows-2019 environments with various configurations. For each environment, install dependencies, restore or set up vcpkg, and then run build scripts specific to the environment. Finally, upload build artifacts and create a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
